post.description:
Connect a Facebook Ad Account.

The frontend sends the user_token (from FB Login) and the ad_account_id
the user selected. We exchange the token for a long-lived one, fetch
the ad account details from the FB API, and store them.

get.description: List all connected ad accounts for the current org.

schema.title: Response Get Ad Accounts V1 Meta Ad Account Get

get.description:
Fetch campaigns + insights from Facebook for a connected ad account.

Returns campaign list with per-campaign metrics and account-level summary.
Fetch detailed info for a single campaign including ad sets and insights.

get.summary: Get sent WhatsApp notification history for org
get.description:
Returns sent WhatsApp notification history for the current org.
Accessed via the 'View Sent Alerts' page at /app/settings/whatsapp-alerts.
Supports filtering by status, text search, and date range.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status: sent, failed, limit_exceeded
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by status: sent, failed, limit_exceeded

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search lead name, phone, email, or form name
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search lead name, phone, email, or form name

parameters.name: date_to

schema.description: Filter logs up to this date (inclusive)
schema.title: Date To

parameters.description: Filter logs up to this date (inclusive)

schema.title: Response Get Notification Log V1 Whatsapp Notifications Get

AdAccountResponse.title: AdAccountResponse
AdAccountResponse.description: Response for a connected ad account.

AdSetItem.title: AdSetItem
AdSetItem.description: A single ad set belonging to a campaign.

CampaignDetailResponse.title: CampaignDetailResponse
CampaignDetailResponse.description: Detailed campaign info including ad sets and insight metrics.

CampaignItem.title: CampaignItem
CampaignItem.description: A single campaign merged with its insight metrics.

CampaignListResponse.title: CampaignListResponse
CampaignListResponse.description: Response for the campaign list endpoint.

CampaignSummary.title: CampaignSummary
CampaignSummary.description: Aggregated account-level insight data for summary cards.

CreateAdAccount.title: CreateAdAccount
CreateAdAccount.description: Request body to connect a Facebook Ad Account.

DailyAppointmentEmailConfigSchema.title: DailyAppointmentEmailConfigSchema
DailyAppointmentEmailConfigSchema.description: Stores daily appointment email settings for an organization.

DailyAppointmentEmailTestTriggered.title: DailyAppointmentEmailTestTriggered
DailyAppointmentEmailTestTriggered.description: Response schema for manual daily appointment email trigger.

FeatureCode.title: FeatureCode
FeatureCode.description:
Enumeration of supported feature identifiers.

Used to uniquely identify feature-level usage tracking.
These values may be stored in DB or referenced in usage counters.

NotificationLogResponse.title: NotificationLogResponse
NotificationLogResponse.description: Response model for WhatsApp notification log entry.

OrganizationSettingsResponse.title: OrganizationSettingsResponse
OrganizationSettingsResponse.description:
Aggregated settings response for an organization.

Combines plan constraints + organization-specific settings + usage.

PlanResponse.title: PlanResponse
PlanResponse.description: Response schema for plan retrieval APIs.

PlanUpdateRequest.title: PlanUpdateRequest
PlanUpdateRequest.description:
Admin-level plan update request.

Used when modifying an existing plan configuration.

PlanUpdated.title: PlanUpdated
PlanUpdated.description: Response schema for successful plan update.

SettingsUpdateRequest.title: SettingsUpdateRequest
SettingsUpdateRequest.description:
Top-level request schema for updating organization settings.

Used by organization users (not admins).

SettingsUpdated.title: SettingsUpdated
SettingsUpdated.description: Response schema for successful settings update.

SimpleFeature.title: SimpleFeature
SimpleFeature.description: Simple on/off feature flag for Shopify, Facebook, IndiaMart & billingmodule.

SimpleFeatureUpdate.title: SimpleFeatureUpdate
SimpleFeatureUpdate.description: Admin update for a generic on/off feature.

api_key.title: Api Key
api_key.description: New access token — omit to keep existing

UpdateProduct.title: UpdateProduct
UpdateProduct.description: Schema for updating a product (PUT - requires full update).

UsageLimit.title: UsageLimit
UsageLimit.description:
Defines usage constraints for a feature inside a plan.

Attributes:
    code: Unique identifier for the feature being limited.
    max: Maximum allowed usage within the reset duration.
    reset: Duration after which usage resets (e.g., monthly).

UsageLimitResponse.title: UsageLimitResponse
UsageLimitResponse.description:
Usage information exposed to end users.

Unlike UsageLimit, this includes runtime usage data.

UsageLimitUpdate.title: UsageLimitUpdate
UsageLimitUpdate.description:
Admin-level update schema for usage limits.

Does NOT allow changing feature code (immutable).

WhatsAppFeature.title: WhatsAppFeature
WhatsAppFeature.description:
Plan-level configuration for WhatsApp feature.

Controlled by admin. Determines:
- Whether the feature is available.
- Whether notifications are enabled by default.
- What usage limits apply.
- Which users receive notifications.

WhatsAppFeatureUpdate.title: WhatsAppFeatureUpdate
WhatsAppFeatureUpdate.description:
Admin-level update schema for WhatsApp feature configuration.

Allows toggling availability and modifying limits.

WhatsAppNotificationConfigSchema.title: WhatsAppNotificationConfigSchema
WhatsAppNotificationConfigSchema.description: Stores which org users receive FB lead notifications.

WhatsAppSettingResponse.title: WhatsAppSettingResponse
WhatsAppSettingResponse.description:
Organization-level WhatsApp settings response.

This is what the frontend consumes.
Includes:
- Feature visibility (enabled)
- User-configurable flags
- Usage information
- Notification recipient configuration

WhatsAppSettingUpdate.title: WhatsAppSettingUpdate
WhatsAppSettingUpdate.description:
User-level update schema for WhatsApp settings.

Users are only allowed to modify mutable fields.
They cannot:
- Enable/disable the feature entirely
- Modify usage limits

is_connected.title: Is Connected
is_connected.description: Whether the account has a stored token

api_key_masked.title: Api Key Masked
api_key_masked.description: Last 4 chars visible, rest masked with •
